title: Ex Nihilo Fabricio
description: A Fabric Skyblock Allround Mod - Get Resources from Nothing! And no more grinding, with handy machinery!
body:
This mod is a **new Ex Nihilo concept Mod**, based on **Original Mods** with new and **fresh Twists**!
It adds typical things like:

- Ore Chunks
- Hammers
- Silkworms

But it also **reworks the grindy concepts** of Sieving and gathering resources slowly, into something way more fun!

NEWS:
![Farms & Foods Update!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e784fa038adee23caab4f6a711d4100a2cb3cfa.png)

As a GIANT new Update - You can now Cook and Farm new Ingredients like Tomatos, Onions, Cabbage and 8 More Crops! You can Cook up to 40 different Foods, as well as gain Saplings, or things like Seeds, Oil, Cheese, Butter, or Vinegar from new Barrels!

For your Island progression, there are **Island Seedlings** to throw!

**_Observe_**

![For your Island progression, there are Island Seedlings to throw!](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExenBzNWprcGY4bGtva25pMjN1a29tdW84cHAwc3drd242eDFkaXp6MSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/ipD10UZmonBhW244SA/giphy.gif)

There's also **many machines**, to make your life easier and focus more on your expansion, rather than doing the boring tasks!

For example, the **Farmer** and **Sprinkler**!

![There's also many machines, to make your life easier and focus more on your expansion, rather than doing the boring tasks! For example, the Farmer and Sprinkler:](https://media.giphy.com/media/ur5IipE6KJrls6Jqt5/giphy.gif)

Or use the **Crusher** and **Placer** to grind down your blocks!

![Or use the Crusher and Placer to grind down your blocks!](https://media.giphy.com/media/hJwegGrMkOTlPYEU4d/giphy.gif)

Then make resources from them with the **Siever** too!

![Then make resources from them with the Siever too!](https://media.giphy.com/media/mar78z1qbzlIkf5Xw4/giphy.gif)

And you can also make Cobble automatically with the **Cobble Generator**!

![And you can also make Cobble automatically with the Cobble Generator!](https://media.giphy.com/media/gqW2NritPgWAohQ53X/giphy.gif)

You can also relax, and let **Compostblocks** slowly dry to Dirt, to expand your Island!

_Cheers!_
